Namespace

Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Geodatabase Message Codes for ArcGIS Server Logs.

[Guid("E53A2AAE-484B-4FC6-8159-0109D4377D6C")]
public enum esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode

Fields

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_AcquiringSchemaLock = 102004

102004: Acquiring schema lock.

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_ActivatedSchemaCache = 102008

102008: Activated schema cache message

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_AttemptWithNewSuggestedNameFailed = 102019

102019: Attempt with new suggested name also failed.

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_AttemptingCopyWithNewSuggestedName = 102017

102017: Attempting copy again with a new suggested name.

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_CopyDatasetFailed = 102014

102014: Copy dataset failed.

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_CopyDomainFailed = 102021

102021: Copy domain failed.

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_CopyIndexesFailed = 102020

102020: Copy indexes failed.

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_CopySucceededAfterRenaming = 102018

102018: Copy succeeded after renaming.

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_CreatedDataset = 102010

102010: Created a dataset in the target workspace for source dataset.

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_CursorInfo = 102023

102023: Cursor logging info.

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_DatasetLoaded = 102011

102011: Dataset loaded.

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_DeactivatedSchemaCache = 102009

102009: Deactivated schema cache message

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_DebugMessage = 102003

102003: Debug Message

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_DuplicateDomain = 102022

102022: Domain already exists.

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_ErrorInAcquiringSchemaLock = 102006

102006: Error while acquiring schema lock.

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_ErrorMessage = 102000

102000: Error Message.

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_FailureNotDueToNameConflictBailingOut = 102016

102016: Failure wasn't due to name conflict. Bailing out.

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_FieldNotFoundInDataset = 102013

102013: Field not found in the Dataset.

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_FreeingSchemaLock = 102005

102005: Freeing schema lock.

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_InfoMessage = 102002

102002: Info Message

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_LeakFastForwardCursor = 102027

102027: A fast forward cursor was still active when connection was set back to writable

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_ProfilingSchemaCacheActivation = 102007

102007: Profiling schema cache activation time.

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_ReconcileInfo = 102024

102024: Reconcile logging info.

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_ResolveConflictIsFalseBailingOut = 102015

102015: Resolve conflicts is false. Bailing out.

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_SetConnectionReadOnly = 102025

102025: Set connection to read-only, enabling fast-forward cursors

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_UnsetConnectionReadOnly = 102026

102026: Unset connection from being read-only

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_WarningMessage = 102001

102001: Warning Message

esriGeoDatabaseServerMessageCode_WriteRowFailed = 102012

102012: Writing of row failed.
